pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to a release compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.1.x does not officially support Java 21; using it may lead to runtime failures or missing features required for the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The compiler and runtime need to be configured for Java 21 to utilize new language features and ensure compatibility.
